modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to log into Outlook on Windows 365.

full_description_text: The user is trying to access Outlook. They keep getting an error message. This happens on a Windows computer. They can't figure out why it won't let them in.
short_description: Unable to log into Outlook on Windows 365.
description: The user is trying to access Outlook. They keep getting an error message. This happens on a Windows computer. They can't figure out why it won't let them in.
